headline: Stanley Black & Decker Announces 2nd Quarter 2026 Dividend and New Share Repurchase Authorization
summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) (the "Company"), a global leader in tools and outdoor solutions, announced today that its Board of Directors approved a regular second quarter cash dividend of $0.83 per common share. The dividend is payable on Tuesday, June 23, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on Monday, June 8, 2026.
